---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Medicare

```{r setup}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| cache: false
#| comment: ""
library(ccn)
source("code/gt_theme.R")
```

<br>

Providers and Suppliers paid under _Medicare Part A_ have __6 digit__ CCNs.
The first two characters represent the state in which the provider is located.
The last four characters identify the type of facility.

## Facility Ranges

```{r}
#| label: medicare-ranges
#| echo: false
#| message: false
ccn::medicare_ranges |>
  collapse::fgroup_by(abbr) |>
  collapse::fsummarise(
    desc = toString(desc),
    range = toString(range)
  ) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::pct(100),
    quarto.disable_processing = TRUE
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_nytimes() |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font(name = "JetBrains Mono"),
      color = "grey60",
      size = "small"
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(columns = range)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = gt::cells_body(columns = abbr)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(color = "grey50", size = "small"),
    locations = gt::cells_body(columns = desc)
  )
```


## Examples

```{r}
#| label: medicare-examples
#| echo: false
#| message: false
purrr::map(c("050599", "440058"), ccn::as_data_frame) |>
  collapse::rowbind(fill = TRUE)

hosp <- ccn:::get_pin("hosp")

hosp |>
  collapse::mtt(ccn = substring(ccn, 1L, 6L)) |>
  collapse::sbt(stringi::stri_detect_regex(ccn, "[ABEFLJGHK]")) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_nytimes() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::pct(100),
    quarto.disable_processing = TRUE
  )

hcount <- hosp |>
  collapse::sbt(!is.na(subgroup)) |>
  collapse::sbt(
    stringi::stri_detect_regex(subgroup, "REH[:]", negate = TRUE)
  ) |>
  collapse::fcount(subgroup) |>
  collapse::roworder(-N)

hcount |>
  collapse::sbt(N > 11) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_nytimes() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::pct(100),
    quarto.disable_processing = TRUE
  )

hcount |>
  collapse::sbt(N <= 11) |>
  gt::gt(groupname_col = "N", row_group_as_column = TRUE) |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_nytimes() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::pct(100),
    quarto.disable_processing = TRUE
  )

hosp |>
  collapse::sbt(!is.na(subgroup)) |>
  collapse::sbt(stringi::stri_detect_regex(subgroup, "REH[:]")) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_nytimes() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::pct(100),
    quarto.disable_processing = TRUE
  )
```
